creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #3)
I tried your patch.

After removing this existing package from my poudriere repo, builds are now successful:

[18:45 pkg01 dvl /usr/local/poudriere/data/packages/141amd64-pgeu_system/All] % sudo rm py39-setuptools-63.1.0_1.pkg

Thank you
